hero_subtitle: From AI cinematic videos to full-scale brand campaigns — we create content that converts, captivates, and scales.
for_subtitle: Whether you're creating products, selling apparel, or scaling a business — AMD STUDIO creates content that performs.
card1_desc: Cars deserve cinematic treatment. We produce AI-powered and real-camera automotive content that puts your vehicle in another dimension — literally.
card2_desc: Product content that drives clicks and conversions. Editorial-quality visuals, reels, and ad creatives built for Meta, TikTok, and beyond.
card3_desc: From local brands to growing companies — if you need content that builds authority and grows your audience, we have a package for you.
step1_desc: We align on your brand, goals, aesthetic, and deliverables. One conversation — fully mapped.
step2_desc: AI generation, real-camera shoots, After Effects compositing — executed at the highest level.
step3_desc: You review, we revise. We don't stop until the content exceeds your expectations.
step4_desc: Final assets delivered upscaled 4K, ready to post, run as ads, or embed on your site.
slider_subtitle: Drag to compare the original against our AI-enhanced final output.
t1_quote: AMD STUDIO completely transformed how we present our product online. The AI video content they produced for us was unlike anything we'd seen at this price point — cinematic, sharp, and on-brand.
t2_quote: The attention to detail in every shot is insane. Our social media engagement tripled after switching to AMD STUDIO for our content. They understand both the creative and the algorithm.
t3_quote: Working with AMD STUDIO was seamless from start to finish. They handled everything — the strategy, creation, and posting. We just focused on running our business while our brand grew.
about_p1: AMD STUDIO is an AI-powered creative agency based in Orange County, CA, built on a decade of hands-on experience in media production, content strategy, and brand storytelling.
about_p2: Founded by a creator who has spent 10 years in media and content production — and the last 3 years at the forefront of AI-generated content — AMD STUDIO exists at the intersection of technical precision and visual artistry.
about_p3: What started as a deep passion for automotive photography evolved into a full-service creative operation. As AI tools began reshaping the production landscape, AMD STUDIO was already ahead of the curve — actively integrating the latest models, software, and workflows to produce content that was faster, more scalable, and more visually powerful than traditional methods alone could achieve.
about_p4: Today, AMD STUDIO serves automotive brands, apparel companies, and growth-focused businesses that refuse to settle for average content. Every project is approached with the same standard: world-class execution, delivered on time, built to perform.
